summary: Plan-mode classification only. #90844 remains the live canonical issue for the /export-session CLI/ACP backend transcript export bug. #90867 is a related contributor PR for the same bug family, but it is not merge-ready because the hydrated preflight shows failing checks and ClawSweeper bot blockers for syntax/render coverage and real behavior proof. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix PR action is planned.

actions.reason: #90844 is the best live canonical because it is the open issue describing the root user-visible failure and there is no landed or merge-ready fix in this cluster.
#90867 should remain related to the canonical issue but not be merged or used to close #90844 until the failing checks and review blockers are resolved.
